prompt:
Extreme close-up vertical portrait, beautiful East Asian woman, early 20s. Soft oval face, faint freckles, small mole on right cheek, delicate jawline, thin nose. Long straight jet-black hair, thick blunt full bangs, glossy with cool-lit highlights. Large blue-toned eyes looking straight at camera, dreamy/melancholic expression, lips slightly parted with natural pink gloss.
Cinematic cool-toned lighting, teal-cyan color grading, soft volumetric light, subtle rim light on hair, gentle facial shadows. Background: vast blurred Japanese meadow, soft daylight, heavy bokeh, dreamlike. Subject slightly right of center, shoulders/hair cut off at frame bottom.
85mm lens, f/1.8, full-frame, cinematic film grain, ultra-high-res, sharp focus on eyes/face, realistic skin pores and peach fuzz, moist lips, detailed hair strands. Cool tones, skin still looks alive, soft contrast. Mood: melancholic, ethereal, introspective, high-budget film still.
Exclude: over-retouching, plastic skin, body distortion, text, logos, watermarks, cartoon style, artificial studio lighting. Static moment, slight tousled bang tips/temple hair for realism, faint sky/field reflections in eyes.
